product.name: Arof
product.categorySourceGroup: Track Suit and Light Mesh Fabrics
descriptions: Arof 100% polyester, 220 g/m² warp knitted fabric for track suit with thermal protection function. Backside of the fabric is fleece.
It is mostly used as sport suits for runners and soldiers.
technicalParameters: Dimensinal Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | TS EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
